name: Craig City Gym
description: Craig City Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Craig, AK. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Craig High School
description: Craig High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Klawock, AK. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: RJ Elementary School
description: RJ Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Metlakatla, AK. There are 2 hard courts. 1 is outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.
